name: enforce-file natively enforces the full-stack rule set on app code when --include-app-code is set
command:
printf 'const x: any = 1;
' > a.ts && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/enforce-file.sh" --file a.ts --include-app-code 2>e.txt; grep -qE 'status=red rules_checked=[0-9]+ blocking=[1-9]' e.txt && echo native-fullstack-enforced 1>&2
